name: TENGU

abilities.name: Demise (Blink)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, it may remove a friendly Scheme marker in LoS. If it does so, this model makes a Scheme marker in base contact with itself.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

actions.name: Leap
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range.

extraction_notes: STN: 8 appears below the artwork - this appears to be a stat card number or identifier
The characteristics show 'Minion (3)' indicating model_limit of 3
